purpose: Minimum operating baseline for company-managed Omnipotens analysis environments.
requiredAdministration: Use an organization-managed LLM account and disable model-training opt-in.
Set the provider and application retention periods before production use.
Use a managed secret store; never place credentials in the package or prompts.
Allow only approved MCP servers, browser connectors, and external applications.
Store generated reports in an access-controlled company location.
enforcementNote: This file is a portable policy baseline. Enforce its controls in the LLM tenant, endpoint management, network gateway, and project access controls; installing this package alone cannot enforce them.
